14112.content:
"How about we swap back for now." Mindy suggested.
"Sure, works for me." Chris said relieved grabbing his boxers back and pulling them on. he felt his penis return to his lower body, feeling normal again.
"So, I guess you'll go back to your friends now?" Mindy asked him.
"Yeah, but wait here a second." Chris said, getting an idea.
"Okay?" Mindy said confused.

Chris went back over to his friends in the other room.
"Could everyone follow me to the laundry room?" Chris asked as they all looked at him confused.
"What for?" Jessica, his girlfriend, asked.
"I can explain when we're there." Chris smiled as they all nodded and followed him.

"You all know my sister." Chris said pointing at Mindy as they walked into the laundry room.
They all nodded as Chris took a look at everyone in the room.

First there was himself. He had medium brown hair, blue eyes, stood at 5’8'' and was currently wearing black and white trainers, jeans, green and white shirt, blue boxer shorts and red baseball cap with red brim. He was also a baseball player.

There was his sister Mindy. She had long frizzy brown hair, blue eyes and stood at 5’2''. She was currently wearing maryjane shoes, navy tights, pink bra and panties, black skirt, glasses, pink sweater and pink headband. She was a bit chubby at 135lbs as well.

There was his friend Jayson he had short black hair and was 5’7'' tall. He was wearing a black and red tracksuit, white trainers, red boxers and a black baseball cap. He was a track runner.

Another friend was called Mike. He had blonde hair and stood at 5’9''. He was wearing basket ball shorts, a tank top and a white and black cap. He was a fairly decent basketball player.

Chris's girlfriend was called Jessica. She had jet black hair and stood at 5'5''. She was currently wearing a flannel shirt tied over white shirt, blue jeans, black and white shoes and she always wears sunglasses.

Jayson's girlfriend Michelle had blonde hair and was 5’6'' tall. She was wearing black ankle boots, a black skirt, white blouse and a black jacket.

Mike’s girlfriend Rachel had nice brown hair and stood at 5’4''. She was wearing some jean shorts, stroppy sandals, a blue tank top and a silver jacket.

"So the reason I called you in here is because we discovered something amazing. Look at this." Chris said with a big smile as he showed them the swap powder.
"What is that?" Rachel asked as nobody seemed to immediately understand.
"This powder, whenever it is used to wash clothes, gives those clothes a very interesting new power. Whenever clothes have been washed when using this power, whenever someone puts on those clothes, their corresponding body part is swapped between wearer and owner." Chris explained.
"What, that is absolute nonsense." Jayson said dismissing his claim as nothing more than a wild fantasy.
"It's true, tell them sis." Chris said looking at his sister.
"They won't believe me either." She shook her head.

"Do you have any proof? You look completely normal to me." Michelle said, backing up her boyfriend.
"It has no effect if you wear your own clothes." Chris pointed out.
"Then we just have to show them brother." Mindy said with a smirk.
"I guess so" Chris said as he started to take off his shirt.
"Oh no, not that." Mindy giggled as she took off her skirt and tights once again and slipped off her panties. "Here!" She yelled as she threw her panties at him.
"Really?" Chris said annoyed looking at the pink panties he just caught. He looked at his friends and while they were trying desperately not to laugh, they did seem to be encouraging in their own way.

Chris took a deep sigh and dropped his pants and boxers. He stepped into his sister's panties and pulled them on. As soon as he put them in place, a smile appeared on everyone's face as they saw Chris's penis disappear and be replaced by Mindy's snatch, while Chris's penis appeared between her legs.

"Oh my god it actually works!" Jessica giggled.
"Okay, sorry I didn't believe you, but in my defense, that isn't exactly common." Jayson apologized.
"Don't worry, but now that you all know, are you interested?" Chris said as he took off the panties again and threw them back over to his sister as he got dressed in his own clothes again.
"Absolutely." They pretty much all said simultaneously.

"We need to have everyone's current outfit get washed for it to work for all of us however." Chris warned.
"That's fine, let's just strip and throw them in, it's not like we haven't seen each other naked before." Rachel suggested. All of them nodded as they each undressed and prepared the washing machine to wash their clothing.

"So how about we play a game?" Chris suggested. Everyone seemed to be down with that, but it was just a matter of discussing what kind of game.
